title: Actually Harvest
description: An actual working right click harvest without dependencies. XP from harvest feature as well. Should work with most modded farming mods.
body:
A mod that actually works with right click harvest for both Forge and Fabric. There are a ton of options out there. All require an external library and they are flaky! Either they don't work at all, or require manual configuration for all the common farming and foods mods (and there aren't very many).

This mod supports most modded crops and trees, is configurable and will actually work when released.

There are possible conflicts with using other right click harvest features in other mods, please report if so and I can update to resolve the conflicts. It is best to just disable the feature in other mods providing duplicate functionality.

## Configuration Options
 - Allow harvesting with empty hand. If disabled, requires hoe.
 - Ability to add a durability cost to harvesting with hoe.
 - Ability to automatically configure other modded crops mods
 - Ability to set a range for low tier hoe harvest (gold, wood, stone, iron)
 - Ability to set a range for high tier hoe harvest (diamond, netherite)
 - Ability to expand range of hoe harvest based on efficiency enchantment level
 - Manual configuration of harvestable crops and blocks
 - XP from Harvest - chance and amount

## Supported Mods
 - Pam's HarvestCraft 2
 - Croptopia
 - Farmer's Delight
 - The Veggie Way
 - Fruitful Fun

## Credits
This mod was a partial re-implementation of the excellent Quark harvest feature. It always works, but Quark always takes a while to update and the other available options either don't work at all, or only partially work.
